office_does: A state senator writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An incumbent senator and former school-board president faces a restaurant owner campaigning on taxes, regulation, affordability, and public safety.

candidates.summary: Krishnadasan is an incumbent senator and former school-board president emphasizing education, affordability, transportation, reproductive rights, and safety.
highlights: Brings Senate incumbency and former school-board leadership [S2]
Official priorities include reproductive rights, education, transportation, and affordability [S2]

experience.basis: She combines current Senate service with prior elected school-board leadership.

social.basis: Her official record emphasizes reproductive rights.

candidates.summary: Parker is a restaurant owner and philanthropist whose campaign themes include taxes, regulation, affordability, and public safety.
highlights: Runs as a business and philanthropic outsider [S2]
Identifies taxes, regulation, affordability, and public safety as campaign themes [S2]

taxes.basis: Taxes are a stated campaign theme in an affordability and regulation-focused platform, though no detailed proposal is documented.

safety.basis: Public safety is a campaign theme, but the dossier provides no detailed enforcement mechanism.

experience.basis: He is a business and philanthropic challenger with no documented elected record.
